active_goal: Improve MemoryOS Lite v3 into a benchmark-usable Letta-style agent memory system for LongMemEval and LoCoMo, without demo-only phase completion, without hiding case-level regressions, and without enabling the v3 kernel by default.

context_bundle.summary: Fresh Phase 5 repeat bundle for Context Composer And Accounting; stale Phase 8 promotion state and stale no-judge Phase 5 artifacts must be superseded.

phase_objective: Make v3 context packaging a Letta-style component composer with component-level budgets, inclusion/drop reasons, source ids, and query-to-evidence-to-final-context traceability for LongMemEval and LoCoMo.
required_red_tests_before_implementation: Add a focused test proving selected recall evidence and its source ids are visible in final v3 context/public diagnostics.
Add a focused test proving component budget drops include layer, item id, source id, token count, and reason.
Add a LoCoMo-shaped temporal/session test proving neighboring same-session evidence is kept or explicitly diagnosed as dropped.

milestone_eval_commands.longmemeval: MEMORYOS_MEMORY_ARCH=v3 uv run memoryos eval public --benchmark longmemeval --data-path benchmarks/longmemeval/longmemeval.json --baseline memoryos_lite --limit 30 --llm-answer --llm-judge --comparison-report .memoryos/evals/public_20260521_213550_longmemeval.json --run-id phase5_repeat_20260522_1315_lme_30
milestone_eval_commands.locomo: MEMORYOS_MEMORY_ARCH=v3 uv run memoryos eval public --benchmark locomo --data-path benchmarks/locomo/locomo10.json --baseline memoryos_lite --limit 30 --llm-answer --llm-judge --comparison-report .memoryos/evals/public_20260521_214906_locomo.json --run-id phase5_repeat_20260522_1315_locomo_30

usable_ack_checklist: Real v3 MemoryOSService.build_context path emits component accounting and final context trace metadata.
Public benchmark report exposes case-level query-to-evidence-to-final-context diagnostics.
Budget-dropped items are not counted as selected.
LoCoMo temporal/session neighboring behavior has a focused test and case-level eval notes.
No demo-only or stub-only completion remains.
LongMemEval and LoCoMo case-level results list pass-to-fail and fail-to-pass separately.
review_focus: Check stale phase-5 artifacts were superseded and no old Memory Lifecycle phase semantics leaked into ACK.
Check source grounding and selected/rendered evidence diagnostics are not conflated with aggregate pass rate.
Check LoCoMo 0/30 is not hidden by LongMemEval results.
Check no benchmark case-id or expected-answer hacks.
Check context bundle was used by plan, execute, and review outputs.
repeat_reason: previous Phase 5 milestone rows had judge_status=not_run
previous Phase 5 movement rows were all new_case_no_baseline
live state drifted to Phase 8 before Phase 5 had usable ACK evidence
